description: A v2 payload using the schema_gap category (also absent from the v1 vocabulary), warning severity, with a recommended_action. Maps to one calculation record summary (machine_screened_warning) and builds one needs_curator_review task.

audit_event_details_json.summary: A schema-gap warning on a calculation record.

findings.message: Calculation references a quantity the schema cannot yet store first-class.
findings.recommended_action: Record the quantity in a follow-up once the schema supports it.

expected.recommended_action: Record the quantity in a follow-up once the schema supports it.
